response.overview: Why is my money in Robinhood not withdrawable.✨1❄888❄576❄2041✨ Funds in Robinhood may be temporarily unavailable due to trade settlement periods, which typically take up to 2 business days. ✨1❄888❄576❄2041✨  Additionally, recent deposits must clear before withdrawal, usually within 5–7 business days. Holds may also occur due to pending transactions or account verification requirements. ✨1❄888❄576❄2041✨ Users should review account notifications for specific details. ✨1❄888❄576❄2041✨
response.title: Robinhood withdrawal my money
